rationale: Increasing the exemption amount requires the comptroller to update the prescribed explanation content and application forms to reflect the new $200,000 threshold. This is a routine rulemaking update, not a structural conflict.
quote: The comptroller shall prescribe by rule the content of the explanation required by Subsection (a) of this section, and shall require that each exemption application form be printed and prepared:
_note: §11.44 governs notice and application form procedures; no dollar threshold is specified in this section, so the conflict is limited to the comptroller's rulemaking obligation to keep forms and explanations current.
